text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Ryan, thank you for that wonderfully fragrant tea
this morning.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Oh, you're very welcome. But actually...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
There's still one more present. I'm just not sure
when to give it to you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You see, I was able to get tickets... to the big
game.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
G-g-give them to me now, if possible! I want to
see them with my own eyes immediately!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Haha, understood! I'll be right back with 'em!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
(It's been a long time since I've seen that kind of
joy in her.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: This is the game where Yutaka might break the all-time record for home runs! I cannot miss this chance!
